observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, p5 creative-coding probes, Remotion timeline code, Manim explainer stubs, TouchDesigner/twozero local-network handoffs, browser-native demos, and repo-local skill packages. Creators still need a printable process surface that keeps capsule memory, proof, public boundary, and remix rules portable when collaborators are away from the browser.
population: creator capsule print/export surface mutations for portable process handoffs and externally-rendered creator workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into a printable or handoff-ready artifact faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, remix discipline, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into three public-safe colorway proofs so a creator can choose a remix direction before regenerating the final artifact.
candidates.phenotype: Deterministic colorway JSON plus fixed-canvas comparison sheet, deferred until two surfaces need the same palette proof
candidates.risk: Can become a palette dashboard unless it directly selects the next artifact mutation and blocks unsafe/raw reference inputs.

candidates.mutation: Add a machine check (bun creator:multi-surface-proof) that validates every retained surface HTML artifact against measure:check + print:render in one pass, using the existing fixed-canvas contracts. This is the artifact-companion to the regression orchestrator.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-multi-surface-proof.ts that iterates over all retained surface HTML files, runs measure:check and print:render for each, and reports overflow/render completeness
candidates.risk: Must stay in sync with WORKFLOW_INDEX surface entries; must not hardcode paths that change.

candidates.mutation: Add a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (bun creator:darwin-autonomy-check) that validates repo anchor, dirty-worktree safety, MCP connectivity, and baseline gates before an autonomous cron slice begins execution.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-darwin-autonomy-check.ts that runs repo-anchor validation, git status safety, MCP test, and baseline creator:mutation-check as a single gate before autonomous execution
candidates.risk: MCP test may fail transiently on some providers; must treat MCP unavailability as a warning, not a hard block.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (15-surface check + hackathon:score in one pass)

retention: Retain creator-regression-orchestrator-route (PR #44) as the unified regression gateway: single-pass 15-surface check aggregator (bun creator:regression) with per-surface PASS/FAIL, timing, and aggregate verdict. Replaces creator-skill-release-route as the active winner (blocked by external publish boundary). New winner: creator-colorway-remix-route (palette proof for remix safety). Added creator-multi-surface-proof-route and creator-darwin-autonomy-route as fresh candidates.
